# Sebo Mayer — Web & Mobile Developer

> Portfolio of Sebo Mayer (Sebastian Mayer-Murschall), a web & mobile developer
> based in Tittmoning, Bavaria, Germany, building fast, animated interfaces.
> The site is bilingual: German is the default at the root, English lives under
> /en/.

## Pages

- [Home](https://sebo.zone/): hero, approach statement, selected-work reel, work list.
- [Projects](https://sebo.zone/work/): project grid with a tag-driven filter.
- [About](https://sebo.zone/about/): bio, capabilities, process, technologies.
- [Archive](https://sebo.zone/archive/): full chronological index of projects.
- [Legal notice / Impressum](https://sebo.zone/impressum/)
- [Privacy / Datenschutz](https://sebo.zone/datenschutz/)

English equivalents are served at the same paths under /en/ (e.g.
https://sebo.zone/en/work/).

## Stack

Astro (static output), GSAP, Lenis, WebGL/Three.js. Fonts and JS libraries are
self-hosted (no third-party CDNs) to respect German data-protection law (DSGVO).
